# unifi_account (Data Source)

Look up a UniFi RADIUS account by ID or name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a RADIUS account by name
data "unifi_account" "example" {
  name = "jsmith"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the RADIUS account. Specify either id or name.
- `name` (String) The username of the RADIUS account. Specify either id or name.

### Read-Only

- `network_id` (String)
- `site_id` (String)
- `tunnel_config_type` (String)
- `tunnel_medium_type` (Number)
- `tunnel_type` (Number)
- `vlan` (Number)
